mapper.select: SELECT route_no, route_name, total_vehicles, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_bus_route ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT route_no, route_name, total_vehicles, status, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM created_at) * 1000 AS created_at, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM updated_at) * 1000 AS updated_at, updated_by FROM hd_bus_route WHERE route_no = #{routeNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hd_bus_route (route_no, route_name, total_vehicles, status, updated_by) VALUES (#{routeNo}, #{routeName}, #{totalVehicles}, #{status}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE hd_bus_route SET route_name = #{routeName}, total_vehicles = #{totalVehicles}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE route_no = #{routeNo}
